highlights: User-facing account action renamed to Cancel account instead of immediate deletion
Password-confirmed 30-day recovery window before permanent deletion
Automatic account reactivation on password, Google, Facebook or Apple login
All active API sessions revoked when cancellation begins
Permanent purge limited to explicitly cancelled accounts whose grace period expired
Ordinary inactive accounts are never deleted merely for inactivity
Backward-compatible DELETE /account endpoint now schedules cancellation instead of immediate destruction
Flutter deprecated Color.withOpacity and form-field value usages removed
Analyzer CI wrapper fails on real errors and warnings but not informational lints
Regression tests for cancellation, restoration, admin protection and safe purge
external_configuration_required: Laravel Scheduler must run every minute in production
WARQNA_API_URL must point to the deployed HTTPS Laravel API
Database backups and retention policy must be enabled before production
Google, Facebook and Apple OAuth credentials are required for social login
